Bus Timings

Bus 67 Timings Endurance City Terminus to Ghubaiba Bus Station

May 24, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

It’s a lifesaver for anyone commuting between central Dubai and the outskirts, hitting up all the important spots along the way.

Whether you’re a local just trying to get to work or a tourist out to explore, Bus 67’s got you covered.

Route Name 67
Route Description Endurance City Terminus - Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49
Total Distance Approximately 58.5 kilometers to 69.2 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 117 minutes
Operational Hours 06:10 to 22:40 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 67

Bus 67 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 67 follows a regular schedule to accommodate various travel needs throughout the day. Here are the timings for the bus:

From Endurance City Terminus From Ghubaiba Bus Station
08:15 06:10
09:55 07:45
12:25 10:15
14:10 12:00
16:30 14:20
18:20 16:05
20:58 18:40
22:40 20:30

Bus 67 Timetable

To view the complete timetable, visit the official RTA site or check this link for Bus 67 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 67 is AED 3. This affordable pricing makes it a cost-effective option for passengers traveling along its route, whether for daily commutes or occasional trips.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 67 does not provide online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route without the need for prior reservations. For real-time updates and route information, you can use the RTA Dubai app, which offers up-to-date details on bus schedules and routes. Additionally, checking bus schedule displays at major stops can help ensure you catch the bus at the right time.

Bus Route

Bus 67 operates between Endurance City Terminus and Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49. The route covers a wide range of stops, making it a valuable option for those traveling across different parts of Dubai. Here is a detailed list of the stops along the Bus 67 route:

  1. Endurance City Terminus

  2. Endurance City

  3. Endurance City Gate

  4. Seh As Salam Farm

  5. Seh As Shuyeb

  6. Nakheel Stables 2

  7. Tawai Mura Camp

  8. Al Lusaili Commercial Center

  9. Lusaili, Masjid

  10. Al Lusaili Defence

  11. Al Lusaili Intersection

  12. Al Lusaili Camel Market

  13. Al Fathan Masjid

  14. Dubai Outlet Mall

  15. International Center For Biosaline Agriculture

  16. EPPCO, Muntazah Petrol Station

  17. Avenue Mall

  18. Nad Al Shiba 2, Main Masjid

  19. Wasl Club

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Latifa Hospital

  2. Oud Metha Road, 2

  3. Oud Metha Road

  4. Oud Metha Metro · 2

  5. BurJuman Metro, 3

  6. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  7. Sharaf DG Metro · 3

  8. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  9. Nahda Street

  10. Raffa

  11. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check are the 77 bus route, which runs from Baniyas Square Metro to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School and back, and the 83 route, which operates from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Khail Metro Seaside.

Bus 67 Station Overview

Endurance City Terminus

This station is designed to handle a significant volume of travelers with amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and up-to-date schedule information.

The station’s facilities ensure a comfortable and convenient travel experience for all passengers.

Intersecting Bus Routes at Burjuman Metro Bus Stop

The Burjuman Metro Bus Stop serves as a major transit hub where several bus routes intersect, enhancing connectivity for passengers throughout Dubai. Key routes that converge at this station include 66, 67, 61D, C03, C18, F70, X23, and X25.

This central location provides seamless travel options across different city areas, making it a vital stop for commuters and ensuring efficient access to various destinations.

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49 is an essential transit hub situated in the Ghubiba area of Dubai. It is well-equipped to handle a high flow of passengers, featuring amenities such as covered waiting areas, ticketing counters, and real-time bus schedule updates.

This station’s central location makes it a key point for accessing various local and regional destinations, offering seamless connectivity for commuters. Its proximity to major commercial and residential areas ensures that it serves as a vital part of the public transportation network, facilitating convenient and efficient travel.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 67 passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai. Here’s a brief overview of some key points along its route:

  1. Dubai Outlet Mall: This large shopping center is a popular destination for bargain hunters looking for discounted brand-name products.

  2. International Center for Biosaline Agriculture: This center focuses on research and development in the field of biosaline agriculture and often welcomes visitors interested in innovative agricultural practices.

  3. Latifa Hospital: While primarily a healthcare facility, Latifa Hospital’s location provides access to nearby areas that might be of interest to visitors.

  4. BurJuman Metro Station: Located near the BurJuman Mall, which is a major shopping and entertainment destination in Dubai.

  5. Four Points by Sheraton: This hotel is located in a vibrant area with access to various attractions and dining options.

6.

7.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 67 from Endurance City Terminus to Ghubaiba Bus Station offers an adventurous journey through Dubai’s evolving landscape.

Ghubaiba Bus Station serves as a bustling transport hub, connecting you to various parts of the city.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Ghubaiba Bus Station · 49, the furthest point on the 67 bus route starting from Endurance City Terminus, with a price range of AED 201-245. It’s advisable to plan your journey in advance and allow extra time for potential delays.

Bus 67 serves as a crucial transport link connecting Endurance City with central Dubai. Its extensive route and regular service provide an essential option for commuting across diverse areas. By offering a reliable and affordable means of transportation, Bus 67 supports both daily travelers and those visiting various destinations within the city. With its strategic stops and well-timed schedules, it ensures convenient access to key locations, enhancing mobility throughout the region.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: May 24, 2025.
